en: That's a good Grinch. I thought I'd put your Grinch to the test
by taking you on in the Try Not to Laugh Challenge.
ko: 그래서 웃지 않기 도전에서 너와 대결하면서 네 그린치를 시험해 보려고 해.

en: We're going to take turns watching funny videos, and you have to keep your best Grinch face while trying not to laugh.
ko: 우리는 번갈아가며 웃긴 영상을 볼 거야.

en: My Grinch resting face. Here it comes.
You can go first, actually, so I'm psyched.
ko: 사실 네가 먼저 해도 좋아, 그래서 나는 웃을 수 있어.

en: I can laugh. Okay. Benedict, you go first.
ko: 좋아, 베네딕트, 네가 먼저 해. 준비됐어?

en: Ready? Watch that monitor. Let's play the first video there.
ko: 모니터를 봐. 첫 번째 영상을 재생해 보자.

en: -♪♪ I lost it. I don't think I lost it.
Yeah, yeah. All right, here we go. My turn. All right, good. Let's play it.
Good luck. Good luck to you. You get what? -♪♪
